hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "Gate before STOP: npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run build (this repo has no npm run test - see CLAUDE.md). The owner project convention \"stop-hook bound at 2 non-trivial acks\" is a human review-cadence rule, not an automated counter - Claude Code has no such native mechanism; apply it as judgment per CLAUDE.md > Working conventions."}'
